reviews.review_text: Get food and view of the downtown area from the patio. Marvel was a great server!
Great food and service from Marvel!
Thank you Marvel!
Get food and view of the downtown area from the patio. Marvel was a great server!
Food was amazing and the margaritas were a great size! Loved the decor, especially the umbrellas outside! Mildred was a great server!
Great food and service! I love the tacos so much and had a great time, our server Marvel did a great job
Food was amazing and the margaritas were a great size! Loved the decor, especially the umbrellas outside! Mildred was a great server!
Marvel was super friendly, attentive and the food was amazing as always!!!
Marvel did an amazing job. Lunch was perfect outdoors.
Marvel was super friendly, attentive and the food was amazing as always!!!
Marvel has waited on us several times and is always so pleasant and attentive. He’s as good as the food.
Marvel always provides great attentive service! We love coming here for great Mexican food and service!
Marvel did an excellent job, the food was good and fresh. Next time you come in ask for him. Me and my wife enjoy everything.
Marvel was an excellent waiter. Very attentive and kind.
Marvel was an excellent server! Made sure our drinks were refilled frequently and food came out quickly. Food was amazing!
Friendly service, paced exactly right. Our waiter, Marvel, was great!
Great food and staff is very friendly! Wish we knew this place earlier! Marvel was our waiter and he was very nice and friendly!
Marvel was an excellent waiter. Very attentive and kind.
Food was amazing and the margaritas were a great size! Loved the decor, especially the umbrellas outside! Mildred was a great server!
love this place
Marvel always provides great attentive service! We love coming here for great Mexican food and service!
Great food and service! I love the tacos so much and had a great time, our server Marvel did a great job
Always great food! Highly recommend their carne asada tacos. Marvel made the experience even better. Will be back!
This is our go to spot for Mexican. My fiance gets the birria tacos and he says they're the best! I come for the shrimp fajitas and margaritas :) If you haven't tried it, I highly recommend going.

The worst restaurant experience I have ever had.

I placed a takeout order with Ava S. and, after a 30-minute drive home, discovered that my $56 order was poorly prepared, under-seasoned, carelessly thrown together, and partially undercooked. There was even hair wrapped around my jalapeño peppers. The food was so unappetizing that I wouldn't have served it to anyone.

What makes this experience even worse is what I witnessed while waiting for my order. I watched the manager handling fruit garnishes for drinks with his bare hands immediately after touching a yellow and black bag, directly in front of the garnish tray. No gloves, no handwashing—nothing. It was unsanitary and honestly should have been my sign to leave.

When I called simply requesting that my food be replaced, the manager hung up on me. I wasn't asking for a refund, causing a scene, or demanding anything unreasonable. I just wanted the food I paid for to be prepared correctly. Instead, I was met with rudeness and complete disregard for customer service.

I'm not someone who typically leaves negative reviews, but the combination of poor food quality, questionable food-handling practices, and a manager hanging up on a paying customer is unacceptable. Customers deserve to know what they're walking into.

There are plenty of Mexican restaurants in the area that take pride in cleanliness, quality food, and treating customers with respect. Unfortunately, this establishment appears more concerned with taking your money than providing a positive dining experience.

The economy is too expensive for customers to spend their hard-earned money on food that is carelessly prepared and service that is openly disrespectful. Based on what I witnessed, I have serious concerns about the cleanliness standards being followed. If employees are handling drink garnishes with bare hands, it raises legitimate questions about what other health and safety practices may be ignored behind the scenes.

At this point, they can keep the remake. After the way I was treated by management, I have no interest in returning. I will be reporting my concerns to the health department so they can determine whether proper food safety procedures are being followed.

Extremely disappointed, disgusted, and frustrated.

My husband and I were craving Mexican food. Based on so many positive recent reviews we decided on Los Tres Amigos Northville. The reviews  did not match our experience.  Jalepeno poppers did not appear to be freshly made and the cheese was cool and solid not hot and gooey. Sample Platter quesadilla  also had cool set cheese. The flauta and chimichanga were warm not hot. The Sample Platter had one positive, the lettuce looked fresh. Living in San Diego and visiting multiple regions in Mexico, fajitas were always served on a sizzling skillet. We were served a pile of peppers and onions in a shallow dish. We had to hunt for the steak. Many reviews rave about the service.  Unfortunately, we don't share the same opinion. I am not sure why our food and service did not live up to others reviews but we will not be returning or recommending this restaurant.

I wouldn’t know how to describe the food because I never received service. After sitting at the table for 10 minutes watching three other tables be sat after me and getting served without me being offered a glass of water, I left.

Marvel was awesome.
Great food and service! I love the tacos so much and had a great time, our server Marvel did a great job
Great food and service! I love the tacos so much and had a great time, our server Marvel did a great job
Food was amazing and the margaritas were a great size! Loved the decor, especially the umbrellas outside! Mildred was a great server!
Food was great and so was Marvel!
Marvel was an excellent server! Made sure our drinks were refilled frequently and food came out quickly. Food was amazing!
This is our go to spot for Mexican. My fiance gets the birria tacos and he says they're the best! I come for the shrimp fajitas and margaritas :) If you haven't tried it, I highly recommend going.

Thank you for accommodating our group of 12 today! We appreciate the great service, yummy  food, warm chips and the salsa was tasty. This was our first visit to the Northville location and we will be back next time we are in the area.
Went there for taco Tueday had high hopes given the reviews but to be honest they were some  of the worse tacos we ever had.
Great food and service! I love the tacos so much and had a great time, our server Marvel did a great job

This is our go to spot for Mexican. My fiance gets the birria tacos and he says they're the best! I come for the shrimp fajitas and margaritas :) If you haven't tried it, I highly recommend going.

Amazing place with authentic food! I was around this side of town, and decided to try this place with my husband and it did not disappoint. The food was extremely authentic, and I felt like I was back in Mexico. Marvel did not disappoint, super attentive and kind, making sure we were taken care of and he prepared us some amazing margaritas. Will deff come back!
Food was amazing and the margaritas were a great size! Loved the decor, especially the umbrellas outside! Mildred was a great server!
This is our go to spot for Mexican. My fiance gets the birria tacos and he says they're the best! I come for the shrimp fajitas and margaritas :) If you haven't tried it, I highly recommend going.

The food was extremely authentic, and I felt like I was back in Mexico. Marvel did not disappoint, super attentive and kind, making sure we were taken care of and he prepared us some amazing margaritas. Will deff come back!
This is our go to spot for Mexican. My fiance gets the birria tacos and he says they're the best! I come for the shrimp fajitas and margaritas :) If you haven't tried it, I highly recommend going.
Marvel was attentive and kind! And my fajita quesadilla was AMAZING!

My husband and I were craving Mexican food. Based on so many positive recent reviews we decided on Los Tres Amigos Northville. The reviews  did not match our experience.  Jalepeno poppers did not appear to be freshly made and the cheese was cool and solid not hot and gooey. Sample Platter quesadilla  also had cool set cheese. The flauta and chimichanga were warm not hot. The Sample Platter had one positive, the lettuce looked fresh. Living in San Diego and visiting multiple regions in Mexico, fajitas were always served on a sizzling skillet. We were served a pile of peppers and onions in a shallow dish. We had to hunt for the steak. Many reviews rave about the service.  Unfortunately, we don't share the same opinion. I am not sure why our food and service did not live up to others reviews but we will not be returning or recommending this restaurant.
Really great service, and atmosphere even between rushes. Marvel was our server, he was FANTASTIC. Very attentive and kept coming back to check on us. Food was delicious and well priced. :)

Phenomenal experience. We were just looking for a lunch spot with margaritas and Los Tres Amigos dis not disappoint. Huge portions, good prices, wonderful ambiance, and great food! Definitely worth a stop in downtown Northville!

Carne Asada tacos were delicious. Rice and beans were seasoned perfectly. Word of warning though, I had their large margarita all to myself and it would be classified as a fish bowl marg at some other places. But for $16.99 I was VERY happy. Definitely worth coming here. Just make sure you’re not driving if you get a large. 🤣

Sat outside, service was slow, even though they weren't busy at all inside. Waiter was nice, brought chips and salsa for our group of 4, took drink orders. Ran ourt of chips and salsa quickly as there were 4 of us. Asked for more when he brought drinks, which were good. We also ordered dinners at that time. I ordered the Pollo Loco,  with black beans. The meal I got was the Pollo Jalisco, but I took it anyway, wasnt going to send it back. Refried black beans were super watery. Never got the second round of chips and salsa.  First time at this Los Tres Amigos, I love the ones in Howell and Farmington, this one just didn't measure up to those.

Thank you for accommodating our group of 12 today! We appreciate the great service, yummy  food, warm chips and the salsa was tasty. This was our first visit to the Northville location and we will be back next time we are in the area.
The food is great and Marvel kept the service (and the salsa) moving well without making us feel rushed!
This is our go to spot for Mexican. My fiance gets the birria tacos and he says they're the best! I come for the shrimp fajitas and margaritas :) If you haven't tried it, I highly recommend going.

Great food and service! Marvel was an excellent server. Good margs and fajitas and guac.
